extra_slides.purpose: 첫 2초 시선 고정 - 신생아 목욕 실수 경고
extra_slides.prompt:
Portrait 1080x1350. Typography-focused design. Soft pastel background #FFF8F0. Top-right corner: '소아과언니' in warm brown #3D2B1F, Pretendard SemiBold, small size. Center: bold headline '신생아 목욕
이렇게 하면 안 돼요!' in warm brown #3D2B1F, Pretendard ExtraBold 72pt, center-aligned, line height 1.3. Bottom-center: small teal accent text '첫 목욕 전 필수 체크' in #4A9B8E, Pretendard Medium 28pt. Minimal design, no illustrations, clean typography layout, warm parenting aesthetic.

extra_slides.purpose: 온도계로 물 온도 확인하는 실사 클로즈업
extra_slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350. Close-up realistic photo. Korean parent's hand holding a baby bath thermometer in warm water, digital display showing 38°C. Soft natural window light. Clean white baby bathtub edge visible. Gentle steam rising from water surface. Warm pastel color grading #FFF8F0 tone. Focus on thermometer display, shallow depth of field. Calm parenting moment, safe bathing preparation. Professional lifestyle photography, soft shadows, cozy bathroom atmosphere.

extra_slides.purpose: 얼굴부터 닦는 올바른 목욕 순서 실사
extra_slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350. Close-up realistic photo. Korean parent's gentle hand washing newborn baby's face with soft white cotton cloth. Baby lying on clean white towel on changing table. Warm bowl of water nearby. Soft natural light from window. Focus on gentle face-wiping motion, baby's peaceful expression visible. Warm pastel color grading #FFF8F0 tone. Clean minimal bathroom background slightly blurred. Professional parenting lifestyle photography, tender care moment, safety-focused composition.

extra_slides.purpose: 아기 혼자 두지 않는 안전 수칙 강조
extra_slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350. Close-up realistic photo. Korean parent's protective hand firmly supporting newborn baby's head and neck during bath. Baby in small white bathtub with warm water. Parent's other hand visible holding baby's body securely. Soft natural window light. Warm steam, peaceful baby expression. Focus on secure hand grip and support. Warm pastel color grading #FFF8F0 tone. Safe bathing technique emphasized, shallow depth of field. Professional lifestyle photography, reassuring care moment, gentle shadows.
